goal: Generate a step card image for the 'Confirm and receive your vehicle' how-it-works step — a LATAM family loading luggage into a minivan with help from the host in a hotel parking area near Lake Buena Vista.

creative_direction.core_idea: El momento de entrega — host ayudando a familia a cargar minivan en hotel parking cerca Lake Buena Vista
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Este es el payoff del proceso: el vehículo está aquí, el host es helpful, la familia está lista para ir

composition.shot_type: editorial lifestyle step card — family + host + vehicle interaction
composition.layout: family, host, and minivan all visible in frame, hotel parking area context

camera.angle: natural eye level, slight 3/4 angle capturing the handoff scene
camera.depth_of_field: family, host and vehicle all sharp, background softly recognizable

subject.description: LATAM family — parents plus 1-2 children — loading suitcases into a minivan (Chrysler Pacifica or Toyota Sienna style) with help from a Hispanic host aged 28-42. Host assisting naturally — opening sliding door, handing keys, or lifting a bag.
subject.expression: warm, natural, collaborative — a real handoff, not staged
wardrobe: family: casual summer travel clothes, light colors, no brand logos
host: casual professional attire, no rental company uniform
subject.body_language: natural movement — loading, helping, engaged interaction

scene.location: Hotel or resort parking area near Lake Buena Vista, Orlando, Florida
scene.time_of_day: bright Florida natural daylight — warm highlights on all subjects
environment: resort hotel vegetation and Florida sky visible in background
minivan sliding rear door open showing cargo space
scene.background_view: Resort hotel parking area — Lake Buena Vista Orlando, no readable theme park logos
critical_scene_rules: Minivan sliding door must be open showing interior cargo space
No rental company logos on vehicle
Host must look natural and helpful, not staged

lighting.effects: warm highlights on all subjects, natural skin tones, clean vehicle highlights

rules: Warm and human — not clinical or transactional
Florida daylight warmth on all subjects

negative_prompt: no theme park logos or branding
master_prompt: Create a premium editorial step card image for a how-it-works page illustrating the 'Confirm and receive your vehicle' handoff step. Show a LATAM family — parents plus one or two children — loading suitcases into a minivan (Chrysler Pacifica or Toyota Sienna style) with help from a Hispanic host aged 28-42. The host is assisting naturally — opening the sliding door, handing keys, or lifting a bag — in a clean hotel or resort parking area near Lake Buena Vista in Orlando, Florida. The minivan sliding rear door should be open, showing the cargo space. The scene should feel warm, natural, and collaborative — a real handoff, not a staged stock photo. Resort hotel vegetation and Florida sky are visible in the background, with no readable theme park logos. Use bright Florida natural daylight with warm highlights on all subjects. Family in casual summer travel clothes, host in casual professional attire with no rental company uniform. Avoid text, watermarks, theme park branding, rental logos, convertibles, overcast sky, stiff poses, generic stock smiles, cold lighting, and beach context.
